heading: Practice of law by justices and judges
label: 454 Practice of law by justices and judges
text: Any justice or judge appointed under the authority of the United States who engages in the practice of law is guilty of a high misdemeanor.
notes: Historical and Revision NotesBased on title 28, U.S.C., 1940 ed., § 373 (, ).Mar. 3, 1911, ch. 231, § 25836 Stat. 1161Changes in phraseology were made.
amendments: Historical and Revision NotesBased on title 28, U.S.C., 1940 ed., § 373 (, ).Mar. 3, 1911, ch. 231, § 25836 Stat. 1161Changes in phraseology were made.
